name: Right Way Financials
description_short: Right Way Financials offers credit repair services through dispute assistance and credit analysis, claiming to use law to challenge negative items on credit reports.
description_long:
Right Way Financials is a credit repair company operating under the domain therightwayfinancials.com, positioning itself as a solution for consumers with negative items on their credit reports. The company is led by a practitioner named Reneka, who is featured prominently in customer testimonials on the website.

The company's core service model includes an initial 30-minute consultation where they analyze a client's credit report, discussing both negative and positive factors. They then claim to use legal methods to challenge negative items on the client's report. Clients are offered real-time login access to track progress throughout the dispute process. The website emphasizes this hands-off approach with the tagline "Relax while we use the law to challenge negative items on your report."

Right Way Financials distinguishes itself through personalized service, with named practitioner Reneka credited in testimonials for achieving score improvements. The company also offers supplementary products including e-books on credit repair and credit cards ("Best Credit Cards Of 2022"), as well as business setup and vendor list services. They claim a "72 Hour Removal" guarantee in their e-book marketing, though specific details about this claim are not elaborated on the website.

However, the website contains several red flags and limitations. The company provides no verifiable information about credentials, licensing, FTC compliance disclosures, or regulatory registrations. The "72 Hour Removal" claim is presented only as an e-book title without substantiation. The website lacks detail on pricing, contract terms, success rates, or how they differ from DIY dispute methods they claim are inferior. The testimonial from one customer, while positive, is insufficient evidence of consistent results. Consumers should conduct thorough due diligence, verify licensing status, and understand that credit repair results are neither guaranteed nor uniformly rapid.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers personalized 30-minute initial consultation to analyze credit reports
Provides real-time login access to track dispute progress
Named practitioner (Reneka) available with positive customer testimonial citing score improvements
Offers supplementary resources including e-books on credit building and card selection
Claims to use legal methods specifically to challenge negative items
Positions service as hands-off ("Relax while we" work) for busy consumers
Provides business setup and vendor list services beyond basic credit repair
cons: No verifiable information about licensing, credentials, or FTC compliance disclosures on website
"72 Hour Removal" claim appears only as e-book marketing with no substantiation or explanation
No pricing information, contract terms, or fee structure disclosed on website
No published success rates, average score improvements, or performance metrics provided
Only one customer testimonial presented; insufficient evidence of consistent results across client base
best_for: Consumers with negative items on credit reports seeking personalized dispute assistance
Individuals skeptical of DIY credit repair methods who prefer professional representation
Business owners potentially interested in bundled credit repair and business setup services
diagnosis: Right Way Financials is best for consumers actively seeking professional credit dispute assistance who prefer personalized service. The primary caveat is the complete absence of verifiable licensing information, detailed pricing, substantiated success claims, or FTC compliance documentation on the public website—essential information consumers should obtain directly before engaging services.
services: 30-minute initial credit report consultation and analysis
Dispute of negative items on credit reports
Real-time progress tracking via client login portal
Credit report analysis discussing negative and positive factors
Credit card recommendations and comparison resource ("Best Credit Cards Of 2022")
Business setup and vendor list services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
